name: Alexander Campos
description: Independent engineer building local-first AI infrastructure. Memory systems, model routing, cognitive architecture. Ships production software.

services.name: ForgeFrame Setup & Integration
services.description: Deploy persistent memory infrastructure for AI agents. MCP-native, SQLite-backed, works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.

services.name: Agent Infrastructure
services.description: Model routing across Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama. Tier-based dispatch with 40-60% cost reduction. Provider adapters, structured tool-use, streaming SSE.

services.name: Local-First Architecture Consulting
services.description: Audit AI stacks for cloud dependencies. Design sovereignty-preserving migration paths. Data classification and privacy review.

services.name: Memory System Design
services.description: Custom semantic memory with FTS5 search, embedding integration, weighted retrieval with strength decay. Not a vector DB — a memory system with opinions.

projects.name: ForgeFrame
projects.description: Open-source memory for AI agents. MCP server with 12 tools. SQLite + FTS5.

projects.name: Reframed
projects.description: Resume analysis platform. Voice fingerprinting, multi-reader semantic analysis, streaming AI.

projects.name: Guardian
projects.description: Desktop cognitive workspace with reframe detection and awareness-trap detection. Local-only.
